roman: Namah Shri Lakshmi Narayana Lakshmi Narayana

english: O beloved of Lakshmi, lord of Lakshmi, dear to Lakshmi, Narayana
roman: Lakshmi kanta Lakshmi pati Lakshmi vallabha Narayana

english: O lord of Rama (Lakshmi), beloved of Rama, master of Rama — salutations O Hari
Shrinivasa, Venkatesha, lord of the Venkata hill
Govinda accompanied by Lakshmi, Narayana — salutations
roman: Lakshmi sameta Govinda Narayana namo namah

english: Whoever reads the Lakshmi-Narayana Ashtakam with devotion always
roman: Lakshmi Narayana ashtakam yah pathed bhaktitah sada

english: Becomes adorned with all prosperity and takes shelter at Vaikuntha
roman: Sarva sampat vibhusha syat Vaikuntham cha samashrayet
